projects.name: MOSS-TTS
projects.description: MOSS‑TTS Family is an open‑source speech and sound generation model family from MOSI.AI and the OpenMOSS team. It is designed for high‑fidelity, high‑expressiveness, and complex real‑world scenarios, covering stable long‑form speech, multi‑speaker dialogue, voice/character design, environmental sound effects, and real‑time streaming TTS.
projects.desc: MOSS‑TTS Family is an open‑source speech and sound generation model family from MOSI.AI and the OpenMOSS team. It is designed for high‑fidelity, high‑expressiveness, and complex real‑world scenarios, covering stable long‑form speech, multi‑speaker dialogue, voice/character design, environmental sound effects, and real‑time streaming TTS.
projects.descZh: MOSS‑TTS Family is an open‑source speech and sound generation model family from MOSI.AI and the OpenMOSS team. It is designed for high‑fidelity, high‑expressiveness, and complex real‑world scenarios, covering stable long‑form speech, multi‑speaker dialogue, voice/character design, environmental sound effects, and real‑time streaming TTS.

aiInsights.oneLiner: AI编程智能体生态与多模态语音技术爆发，开发者工具链与数据解析基建成核心趋势。

hypeIndex.reason: Agent终端工具、技能库与优化框架获极高关注，生态标准化加速，技术落地导向明确，热度集中且偏理性。

hot: anthropics/claude-code 与 affaan-m/ECC：终端AI编程智能体与性能优化系统爆发，重塑开发者工作流
anthropics/skills 与 EveryInc/compound-engineering-plugin：跨平台Agent技能与插件生态标准化，实现工具链互通
OpenBMB/VoxCPM 与 OpenMOSS/MOSS-TTS：免分词器与高保真语音生成突破，推动实时语音克隆与多角色对话落地
microsoft/markitdown 与 run-llama/liteparse：高效文档解析与Markdown转换成RAG数据预处理核心基建
ruvnet/RuView：利用WiFi信号实现无摄像头空间感知与生命体征监测，拓展非视觉AI传感边界
action: 集成 microsoft/markitdown 或 run-llama/liteparse 重构企业知识库ETL管线，提升非结构化数据转Markdown的效率与RAG检索准确率
参考 anthropics/skills 仓库规范与 anthropics/claude-code API，封装企业内部业务逻辑为可插拔Agent技能，降低重复开发成本
基于 OpenBMB/VoxCPM 的Tokenizer-Free架构或 ruvnet/RuView 的WiFi射频感知算法，搭建低算力依赖的语音合成或无感健康监测PoC
